title: Junior Business Development Manager at My Home Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at My Home Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? My Home Group in Jodhpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About My Home Group:
My Home Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with My Home Group!
